# Automedge - AI Lead Automation

Automedge is a specialized AI platform for home service companies (HVAC, Roofing, Plumbing, Pest Control) that captures every lead and follows up automatically in under 60 seconds.

## Core Features
- 24/7 AI Lead Response via SMS, WhatsApp, and Web
- Native Integrations with ServiceTitan, Jobber, and Housecall Pro
- Automatic Appointment Booking and Lead Qualification
- Real-time Analytics Dashboard

## Verticals
- HVAC
- Roofing
- Plumbing
- Pest Control

## Contact
- URL: https://automedge.com
- Email: team@automedge.com
- Location: Austin, TX
